attempt: Transfer TICKET44's lesson: a bounded numerical or visual pattern is useful only after the proposed feature measure survives exact counteredge extraction and a future-lift theorem.

bounded_result.discarded_shortcut: finite explicit-margin feature score treated as Goldbach
bounded_result.retained_target: A horizon-independent margin feature measure stays positive for every future even-integer lift.
bounded_result.counterexample_target: a future even-integer lift whose feature score is unchanged while margin pressure is nonpositive

obstruction: The current artifact names a better proof target, but it does not close the infinite theorem or produce a certified counterexample.
candidate_theorem: A horizon-independent margin feature measure stays positive for every future even-integer lift.
next_experiment: Extract margin-feature counteredges before promoting any explicit cutoff measure.
claim_boundary: No goldbach proof and no certified goldbach counterexample.
